title: The gut microbiota-immune-brain axis: Therapeutic implications
source: O'Riordan et al., Cell Reports Medicine, 2025

L2: The immune system is a key communication pathway between gut microbiota and the brain
Microbiome dysregulation is implicated in neuroinflammation across health and disease states
L3: Review of the gut microbiota-immune-brain axis examining how the immune system mediates bidirectional communication between gut microbiome and brain function, with therapeutic implications for neuroinflammatory and neuropsychiatric disorders
